# Mochi Mango Arcade

> Mochi Mango Arcade is a free HTML5 games portal and character merch shop by Fire Dragon Interactive. 200 instant-play browser games — runners, puzzles, arcade, tower-defense and cooking games — starring original mascots, playable on mobile and desktop with no download or sign-up.

## About
- Free to play, no install, works in any modern browser.
- Family-friendly original characters across 6 universes: Puddle & Pip Cozyverse, The AstroMochi Crew, Nine Gates Mahjong Kingdom, SnackStreet Squad, Oracle Mirror Oddities, Mochi Mango Originals.
- Companion merch shop: plushies, apparel, pins, stickers.

## Key pages
- [All games](https://mochimangoarcade.com/games/): browse and filter all 200 games.
- [Universes](https://mochimangoarcade.com/universes/): recurring worlds and their games.
- [Characters](https://mochimangoarcade.com/characters/): mascot bios.
- [Merch shop](https://mochimangoarcade.com/shop/): plushies and collectibles.
- [New releases](https://mochimangoarcade.com/new-releases/)
